# Paper tables & figures

Upload the table/figure images here (drag & drop → commit on GitHub web).

Use these exact filenames so they wire up automatically:

## Tables
- `table1.png` — Table 1 (Retriever-only results across four benchmarks)  → Main Results
- `table2.png` — Table 2 (Adapted compression at K=64)                    → Analysis
- `table3.png` — Table 3 (Compression budget analysis)                    → Analysis
- `table4.png` — Table 4 (Component ablation)                             → Analysis
- `table5.png` — Table 5 (Efficiency)                                     → Analysis

## Figures

- `figure3.png` — Figure 3 (Grounding comparison bar chart)               → Analysis
